description:
## Fixes

- Hardened the Gboard settings-style override flow with trial, timeout, recovery, and UI fail-safe protections to prevent crashes from locking users out of settings.

## Note
- Currently supports only the official Gboard 17.0.10.880768217-release-arm64-v8a.

## 修正

- 強化 Gboard 設定頁樣式切換流程，加入崩潰復原與 UI 保底保護，避免因異常閃退導致使用者無法再進入設定頁。

## 注意
- 目前只支援官方 Gboard 17.0.10.880768217-release-arm64-v8a
